_comment: NPC: Zhang Tian (张天). Heng Yue Sect outer sect elder — annual aptitude recruiter for Zhao Country. Canon ID: N-REC-001 (derived). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.3: this NPC triggers the Day 3 ceremony. He is NOT a combat entity — he arrives, tests children, accepts them, and departs.
name: Zhang Tian
personality: impassive, dutiful, slightly weary from years of recruitment; takes patrol seriously, has seen too many disciples fail to be impressed by ambition

perception_tiers.mortal: A stern man in blue robes who descended from the sky
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Heng Yue Sect outer elder, Foundation Establishment realm

note: Annual recruiter. Appears at Wang Family Village on Day 3. Triggers aptitude test ceremony (AptitudeTestEvent.java). Per §5.4: the player can also find him on the road for an early ceremony trigger.

dao_heart.note: Stable but unremarkable. He does his duty.

initiation_lines: The eastern patrol route needs covering tonight. Report any unusual spiritual fluctuations immediately.
I have seen thousands of candidates pass through Heng Yue's gates. Few have what it takes to endure.
The restriction arrays along the northern border are ancient. Do not test them. They will not warn you twice.
Complete your sect duties before chasing personal breakthroughs. The sect protects you — you owe it your effort.

sect_tasks.description: Report to Elder Zhang. Bring spirit stones as proof of sect contribution.
The sect armory needs cold iron for weapon repair. Mine in the northern caves.
